title: YeeGoethGate aggregator: settled() and force()
description: Implement <yee-goeth-gate> custom element that observes a subtree (default: subtree under its parent or itself). Exposes settled(): Promise<void> that resolves when all in-flight yee-goeth holds on the subtree have cleared. Also force(): void that force-settles regardless of in-flight holds (for hard shutdown). Re-arms when new yee-goeth events fire. Attribute: observe= (CSS selector or 'parent' / 'self').

title: Reason taxonomy: disconnected / unapplied / ejected / pagehide
description: Lock down the reason field taxonomy. disconnected: element left the DOM (paired with disconnectedCallback). unapplied: yee-mix removed the element from its target set, but the element itself is still alive in the DOM. ejected: page is force-closing (pagehide with persisted=false). pagehide: page-initiated navigation (pagehide with persisted=true). Document the recommended teardown behavior per reason, with examples: a moq subscription on 'ejected' just drops the socket; on 'disconnected' it sends UNSUBSCRIBE first.

title: YeeGoethEvent class extends ExtendableEvent with reason field
description: Core YeeGoethEvent class. Subclasses ExtendableEvent. Carries a reason field: 'disconnected' | 'unapplied' | 'ejected' | 'pagehide'. waitUntil(promise) extends teardown until the promise settles. Standalone contract package — no yee dep. Includes constructor, YeeGoethEventInit type, and the 'yee-goeth' static type constant. Tests: dispatching without waitUntil is a no-op; waitUntil extends; multiple waitUntil calls accumulate; reason is preserved.

title: Decision: applier protocol adopts yee-goeth for async unapply
description: Formal spec change to the yee applier protocol: unapply(target) MAY dispatch yee-goeth events to register async teardown work. Consumers that care about teardown completion (yee-goeth-gate, yee-mix's transactional phase) wait on those events. Pairs with ythere-applier-protocol: arrival + departure are both extendable.

title: yee integration: gate unapply on yee-goeth
description: yee-mix in v2 should dispatch yee-goeth on each target before unapplying appliers, and gate further target processing (re-apply, target re-ejection) on yee-goeth-gate's settled() promise. Gives yee the graceful teardown semantics that cast-yee, moqy, command-auto-yee all need. Tracked on yee's side as a v2 ticket; this epic is the cross-link.

title: pagehide integration: dispatch yee-goeth on pagehide
description: Wire up pagehide to dispatch yee-goeth with the appropriate reason on every YeeGoethable element in the document. Distinguish pagehide (persisted=true) from ejected (persisted=false). Coordinates with the navigator.scheduling APIs where available. This is the global hook that gives ejected/pagehide reasons teeth.
